task_completion.description: Verify the Tracked Entity Attribute is created with the correct Name and Short name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a configuration screen or list in the DHIS2 Maintenance app showing a Tracked Entity Attribute with Name set to 'National PUI' and Short name set to 'Nat PUI'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Value Type is set to 'Text'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Value Type' field in the attribute configuration screen to be set to 'Text'.
Look for a checked checkbox or enabled toggle next to the 'Unique' setting in the attribute configuration.

task_completion.description: Verify the Pattern (Regex) is configured correctly to enforce the exact format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Pattern' or regex field containing a pattern that enforces two uppercase letters, a slash, and six digits. Crucially, it should include anchors (e.g., ^[A-Z]{2}/[0-9]{6}$) to ensure exact matching and prevent partial matches.

task_completion.description: Verify the attribute is assigned to the 'Person' Tracked Entity Type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Tracked Entity Type configuration screen for 'Person' showing 'National PUI' added to its list of assigned attributes.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Display in list' is enabled for the assigned attribute.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the assignment settings of 'National PUI' within the 'Person' entity type configuration. The 'Display in list' checkbox or toggle must be checked/enabled.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the DHIS2 graphical user interface (Maintenance app) to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the DHIS2 web interface with forms, dropdowns, and checkboxes being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction occurred within the actual DHIS2 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be DHIS2 (typically the Maintenance app), not a generic text editor or unrelated software.

integrity.description: Verify the agent configured a regex pattern rather than just typing the example string.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Pattern field should contain a regular expression (like ^[A-Z]{2}/[0-9]{6}$), not the literal example text 'BO/123456'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Name: 'National PUI'. Target Entity: 'Person'. The Regex Pattern must enforce exactly two uppercase letters, a forward slash, and six digits. To properly enforce the format and prevent partial matches (e.g., allowing 7 digits like 'BO/1234567'), the regex should include anchors (e.g., ^[A-Z]{2}/[0-9]{6}$). Valid example: BO/123456. Invalid examples that must fail: bo/123456, BO-123456, BO/12345, 123456.
